title: Auto Disconnect
description: A simple mod that automatically disconnect you when a certain condition is met 🛜
body:
# Auto Disconnect Mod By I-No-oNe
-----------------
```yml
How to use?
# Install the mod latest version and install midnightLib.
# Press the keybind K on your keyboard to open the GUI.
# Set the conditions for the auto disconnect.
# Turn on/off the settings as you want.
```
-----------------------------------
<details>
<summary>0.4 Version and below</summary>

# Auto Disconnect Mod By I-No-oNe
-----------------
```yml
How to use?
# Install the latest version and install ImproperUI Library.
# Press the keybind K on your keyboard to open the GUI.
# Set the conditions for the auto disconnect.
# Turn on/off the settings as you want.
```
--------------------
## Showcase:
### GUI
![blue gui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e7522caac00ab1a89b0f9e2c2390fbe7912aa2b.png)
----------
### Setting The Keybind
![keybind fot opening the GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d4bb4444a587492bcbe2d93b07a6a9b65650346.png)
--------------------
### In-game Example:
![example in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7d29fafa4380aa07be0724eeed303ffa413c3b7.png)
-----------------

**BE AWARE THAT YOU MUST TO DOWNLOAD THE [**IMPROPER-UI**](https://github.com/ItziSpyder/ImproperUI/releases) LIBRARY IN ORDER TO THE MOD TO WORK!**

------------------
**tysm for using this mod** 🙏

</details>
